text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Nngh, what do I do? Thinking makes me so
hungry! And now I'm only getting ideas about
food... I can't take it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe, what's been troubling you all this while?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hyagh?! G-grass?! How long have you been
there?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Only the whole time. So, tell me about your
worries.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-well... It's about your birthday gift... I don't
know what to get.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, hehe. You needn't bother about that. The
thought is more than enough. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But still, you help me out so much. I really want to
wish you a happy birthday.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In that case, would you run with me? ...I mean for
real, no holding back.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass... Okay, you got it. Only...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mind if we eat first real quick?!
